title: Nmixx Episode 1 Zero Frontier concert in Singapore: K-pop sextet dazzles with powerhouse vocals and heartfelt chemistry
Smart Reads of the Week: Passive Income, Forever REITs, and Smarter Wealth Building
article:
Successful investing is rarely about finding the next hot stock. More often, it’s about building a portfolio that can generate income, compound wealth, and stand the test of time.
This week’s Smart Reads focuses on businesses and investment strategies designed for the long haul. We highlight REITs that investors may want to own forever, blue-chip stocks still offering attractive dividend yields, and practical ways to build a passive income stream from local stocks.
We also examine lesser-known SGX companies quietly rewarding shareholders through share buybacks, discuss the habits that separate successful investors from the crowd, and compare two very different wealth-building approaches. Whether you’re focused on dividends, growth, or financial independence, there’s something here worth exploring.
Here are this week’s top articles:
3 REITs to Buy and Hold Forever
These REITs possess qualities that could make them suitable long-term holdings for income-focused investors.
3 Blue-Chip Stocks Still Offering 6%+ Dividend Yields
Despite the recent rally, these blue chips continue to offer attractive yields for income seekers.
5 Stocks That Can Let You Earn Dividends Every Month — Seriously
A portfolio approach that could help investors receive dividend income throughout the year.
Beyond Blue-Chip: 3 SGX Stocks Quietly Buying Back Their Own Shares
These lesser-known companies are using share buybacks to enhance shareholder value and signal confidence in their businesses.
How to Become a Better Investor: 7 Habits That Beat Stock Tips
Long-term investing success often comes from good habits rather than clever predictions.
DBS vs. NVIDIA: Which One Protects Your Wealth Better?
A comparison between a dependable dividend-paying bank and one of the world’s most exciting growth companies.
The S$500 Passive Income Challenge: How to Start with Just 3 Local Dividend Stocks
Can a small portfolio generate meaningful passive income? We explore one possible roadmap.
REITs Are Back in Focus: 3 Types of Singapore REITs Dividend Investors Should Know
A useful guide to understanding the different REIT sectors and how they fit into an income portfolio.
Invest smarter in 5 minutes a day with Smart Reads. It’s the weekly newsletter trusted by investors, professionals, business owners, and CEOs and for those who want sharp, timely insights without the overwhelm.

title: Millions in Brazil get fake government mobile alert after hack
article:
(June 21): Brazil’s Integration and Regional Development Ministry and federal police are investigating an intrusion into the civil defenxe alert system that sent messages containing the word “misanthropy” to the mobile phones of millions of Brazilians.

The message was sent as an “Extreme Alert” — used to warn the public about extreme weather — in what was likely the result of a hacker attack, according to the ministry. National Secretary of Protection and Civil Defense Wolnei Wolff told a press conference that 10 alerts were tracked in various Brazilian states. The number of phones affected nationwide wasn’t disclosed.

“It’s difficult to say whether one or more people participated in this criminal act,” said Wolff. “This is very bad for the system, considering that we are dealing with people’s safety when we issue the alert.”

The Civil Defense Alert platform was taken offline at 1:30am on Saturday after the breach. No timeframe has been given for when the system will be back online.
